timeBasis: Later Han commandery register, treated as an early-140s gameplay baseline rather than a synchronized 191 census
scope: Retained province/region, ordinary commandery/kingdom or capital-equivalent district, and county-rank rows; dependent-state sections are excluded

The primary register identifies 新息 as a marquisate, but CHGIS's cited chronology says it reverted to a county in 49 CE. Preserve the text; do not treat the rank as valid for 140 or 191 without a date rule.
